svg.text: Privacy-preserving federated learning with blockchain escrow, secure aggregation, consensus, and reward distribution

g.text: - Defines dataset, initial model, reward, deadline, target
- Reads backend state and sends contract transactions
- Train model, compute gradients, apply DGC compression
- Create score commit, NDD-FE sparse ciphertext, ECDSA
- Chosen through task/miner state and stake-aware
- Runs Python API service for aggregation jobs
- Uses task-scoped keys and backend metadata
- Task lifecycle, wallet signature checks, proof verification
- Miner registration, PoS selection, key derivation and delivery
- Opaque relay for submissions, verification votes, publish/reward APIs
- Task, Miner, Gradient, Block, Verification, Reward tables
- Round status and current model links
- Miner proofs and model artifact links
- Updated W_new artifacts for iterative rounds
- Polls backend for task metadata, selected miners, keys,
- Validates sparse schema, signatures, hashes, and participant
- Builds candidate block and submits final payload
- NDD-FE designated decryption over sparse ciphertext
- BSGS recovery of quantized gradient coordinates
- Dense reconstruction only after strict sparse recovery
- Apply W(t+1) = W(t) + eta * aggregate update
- Publish modelLink or carry-forward W_new for next round
- Immutable event log for task and reward state
- M1 reward lock and accuracy commit
- Task status and refund safety path
- M6 model hash, accuracy, score commits

svg.text: Numbers replace long arrow labels to keep the architecture figure readable after export.
Publisher inputs task/reward/accuracy commitment through the UI.
Frontend calls backend REST APIs for task, miner, training, reveal,
Miner clients submit signed sparse ciphertext, score commit, and
Selected aggregator endpoint starts a task-scoped aggregation job.
Backend persists task, miner, gradient, block, verification, and
Backend resolves model, proof, validation, and updated-model
Aggregator fetches task metadata, keys, selected miners, and
Validated payloads enter NDD-FE decryption and BSGS recovery.
Recovered aggregate update is applied to the global model and
Candidate block hash is sent for miner verification consensus.
Model/validation artifacts are read and W_new/modelLink is written
Miners return signed VALID/INVALID verification votes.
Publisher/miner wallets submit contract transactions to the EVM
Backend chain bridge publishes verified block metadata on-chain.
Published block enables commit-reveal and reward settlement.
Reward contract distributes proportional payouts after reveals.
solid: API call, pipeline handoff, or blockchain transaction
dashed: artifact, verification, or reward side flow
